title: Culture Workshops Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Culture Workshops skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

culture_diagnostic_data.description: Culture diagnostic data: survey results, assessment outputs, or leadership observations providing a fact base for workshop discussion

defined_workshop_objectives.description: Defined workshop objectives: what decisions, commitments, or outputs the session is intended to produce

participant_list_roles.description: Participant list with roles and levels represented, ensuring cross-functional and cross-level diversity

facilitator_credibility_independent.description: Facilitator with credibility independent of any single stakeholder group

prior_workshop_outputs.description: Prior workshop outputs or previous culture initiative artifacts to avoid repeating past work

competitive_external_benchmarks.description: Competitive or external benchmarks showing how peer organizations describe their cultural values

ethnographic_observations_interview.description: Ethnographic observations or interview quotes that ground discussion in concrete behavioral examples
